---
title: "Piecewise Interpolation"
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
---

<!--
Copyright (c) 2026 Apurva Nakade. All rights reserved.
Released under Apache 2.0 license as described in the file LICENSE.
Authors: Apurva Nakade
-->

Piecewise interpolation methods approximate a function using simple pieces — straight line segments or low-degree polynomials — fit between a set of sample points. These methods are central to numerical analysis because they let us work with unknown or expensive-to-evaluate functions using only a handful of samples.
